uiBuilder.label: Alert Banner
uiBuilder.description: A tinted status / alert banner with info, warning, critical and AI variants. Icon circle, title, timestamp subtitle, detail lines, body text and an optional clickable link.

properties.name: variant
properties.label: Variant
properties.description: Visual style / severity of the banner.

properties.name: subtitle
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.description: Timestamp subtitle (shown with a clock icon).

properties.name: bodyText
properties.label: Body text
properties.description: Main body message. In the AI variant this is the assessment text.
properties.defaultValue: 1 entity requires compliance review. Workflow cannot proceed until all matches are resolved.

properties.name: showBodyText
properties.label: Show body text
properties.description: Show or hide the body text.

properties.name: detailLine2
properties.label: Detail line 2
properties.defaultValue: Alt North Avenue, Suite 200, New York, NY 10001

properties.name: showDetailLines
properties.label: Show detail lines
properties.description: Show or hide the detail lines.

properties.name: linkText
properties.label: Link text
properties.description: Clickable link text; clicking emits the link-clicked event.
properties.defaultValue: Select the record below that best matches this submission information.

properties.name: showLinkText
properties.label: Show link
properties.description: Show or hide the clickable link.

properties.name: showIcon
properties.label: Show icon
properties.description: Show or hide the leading icon (circle glyph, or AI sparkle).

properties.name: aiLabel
properties.label: AI label
properties.description: Bold label shown before the body text in the AI variant.

actions.name: ALERT_BANNER_LINK_CLICKED
actions.label: Alert banner link clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the banner's link text.
